get.summary: GET /ready — checks DB connectivity (and Redis if configured).

503.description: One or more readiness checks failed

200.description: Organizations available to the current user

get.summary:
GET /api/invitations/pending
Returns all pending invitations addressed to the authenticated user's email.

200.description: Pending invitations for the current user

404.description: Invitation not found or already processed
Invitation not found or already processed

200.description: Auto-join resolution for an email address
Projects visible to the current user
Question templates available in the organization

post.summary: POST /api/sessions — create a new session (can be anonymous).

403.description: Questionnaire not published or access denied

post.summary: POST /api/sessions/check-duplicate — check if a fingerprint already completed this questionnaire.

400.description: No responses provided or session inactive

get.description:
Returns the current completion counts for quota management.
The client evaluates quota conditions against these counts.

post.description:
Accepts a structured filter query and returns matching sessions
with optional aggregated statistics on a key field.

200.description: Media asset with a presigned URL

post.summary:
POST /api/sessions/:id/media — anonymous multipart upload scoped to a session.
No JWT required; validates the session exists and is active.

source.description: Which data source to aggregate: "variable" (default) or "response"

key.description: Variable name or question id to aggregate

PendingInvitation.description: Model returned for pending-invitation list (includes org context).

tags.name: sessions
tags.description: Questionnaire fillout sessions and persisted data
